description: Nesstar is a legacy microdata and metadata management suite for publishing, browsing, analyzing, and downloading survey and statistical data through Nesstar Repository and WebView, with support for DDI-based metadata workflows.
name: Nesstar

description: NADA (National Data Archive) is an open-source microdata catalog and documentation platform for publishing survey and census metadata with searchable documentation, APIs, and standards-based dissemination workflows.
name: NADA

description: Colectica is a metadata and data documentation platform for statistical, survey, and microdata workflows, supporting standards-based curation, publication, and dissemination through web interfaces and APIs.
name: Colectica

description: Mica is an open-source web platform for discovering, cataloging, and harmonizing epidemiological and population health microdata, providing study metadata management and API-based access for data discovery workflows.
name: Obiba Mica

description: Survey Solutions is a World Bank suite for survey data collection and management; the Data Browser provides web access to exported survey microdata and related documentation for authorized dissemination workflows.
name: Survey Solutions
Data Insight
description: Enterprise data intelligence platform for discovering, classifying, and governing unstructured data at scale.

name: Oracle APEX
description: Oracle APEX is a low-code platform for building data-driven web applications, dashboards, and reporting portals on Oracle Database.
capabilities: REST API - Interactive dashboards - SQL-driven reporting - Low-code app builder

name: SDMX-RI
description: SDMX-RI (SDMX Reference Infrastructure) is the SDMX standards-based reference software stack used by statistical organizations to publish and exchange official statistics through interoperable SDMX REST and SOAP interfaces.

name: Data VAVT
description: Data VAVT is an indicators platform for macro- and microeconomic analysis based on statistics from verified domestic and international sources.
SuperSTAR is a hospitality benchmarking and analytics platform from STR used to compare hotel performance indicators, analyze market trends, and support data-driven decisions in the lodging sector.
name: SuperSTAR

description: SDMX-native technology stack and APIs for official statistics portals in the SIS-CC .Stat ecosystem—REST and SDMX services for discovery, structured metadata, and dissemination of indicator data.
name: .Stat Technology
Data.UNICEF.org
description: Data.UNICEF.org is UNICEF's global data and analytics platform that provides indicators, datasets, visualizations, and country profiles focused on child rights and well-being.

name: ILOSTAT
description: ILOSTAT is the International Labour Organization's statistics platform providing global labor market indicators, time series data, and analytical tools for employment, wages, productivity, and related socioeconomic topics.
.Stat Suite is an open-source, SDMX-native platform for managing the official statistics data lifecycle, including dissemination, metadata handling, and standards-based data exchange.
name: .Stat Suite
IBM Cognos Analytics
description: IBM Cognos Analytics is a business intelligence and analytics platform for creating dashboards, reports, and interactive data visualizations for organizational decision-making.

name: World Bank Data Platform
description: The World Bank Data platform provides global development indicators, country and regional statistics, and time-series datasets with downloadable files and API access.

name: BIS Data Portal
description: The BIS Data Portal provides access to statistical and financial indicators published by the Bank for International Settlements, with interactive exploration and machine-readable SDMX/JSON endpoints for programmatic use.

name: ECB Data Portal
description: The ECB Data Portal is the European Central Bank's official platform for accessing macroeconomic, financial, and statistical indicators, with support for interactive exploration and SDMX-based data access.

PX-Web is a statistical data dissemination software used to publish and explore multidimensional statistics online, with support for tabular browsing, API access, and standard statistical exchange formats.
name: PxWeb
Eurostat
description: Eurostat is the statistical office of the European Union and provides official European statistics through datasets, indicators, and interactive data access services.
Open SDG is an open-source platform for publishing Sustainable Development Goal indicators as a web-based reporting portal with data uploads, indicator pages, charts, and downloadable resources.
name: OpenSDG
BI Contour
description: BI Contour is a business intelligence platform for interactive reporting and data analysis. It includes visualization, publishing, and OLAP capabilities and is used to build analytical portals and dashboards for large datasets.

name: WHO Data
description: The World Health Organization data services provide global health indicators, statistics, and monitoring data through web interfaces and APIs for countries and thematic programs.

Semantic MediaWiki is an open-source extension of MediaWiki that enables structured data modeling, semantic annotation, querying, and export from wiki content. It is used to build knowledge-driven data catalogs and portals with machine-readable metadata.
name: Semantic MediaWiki

description: Open Data Registry is an open-source metadata registry for publishing and discovering open datasets, with machine-readable catalog files and optional STAC-compatible endpoints.
name: Open Data Registry

description: uData is an open-source data portal platform for publishing and managing datasets, organizations, and resources with a REST API and DCAT-compatible metadata export.
name: uData
D4Science
description: D4Science is a European digital research infrastructure that provides virtual research environments, data management, and analytics services for collaborative open science workflows across disciplines. It offers integrated tools for data publishing, storage, and processing as a not-for-profit platform.
Socrata is a proprietary open data platform for publishing and managing government datasets with catalog search, APIs, and machine-readable metadata exports.
name: Socrata

description: PublishMyData is a linked data publishing platform designed for government and official statistics teams to publish, manage, and serve structured data on the web using semantic web standards and APIs.
name: PublishMyData

description: WordPress is an open-source content management system widely used to build websites, including open data portals via custom themes, plugins, and API-driven integrations.
name: WordPress

description: Tablion Data Portal is a commercial open data portal product by Aristotle Metadata that supports publishing, discovery, and metadata exchange for datasets through web interfaces and standards-based exports.
name: Tablion
CKAN
description: CKAN is an open-source data management system for publishing, sharing, and using data. It powers hundreds of public open data portals and internal data hubs with datasets, organizations, resources, a rich Action API, and an extensible plugin ecosystem (including DCAT and OAI-PMH).

Strapi is an open-source headless CMS platform used to model, manage, and deliver structured content and data through customizable APIs. It supports flexible content types, role-based access control, and extensible integrations for public sector and open data publishing workflows.
name: Strapi

description: JKAN is an open-source, lightweight data catalog platform built on Jekyll for publishing open datasets as static sites. It focuses on simple deployment, CKAN-style metadata patterns, and optional API compatibility for small and medium open data portals.
name: JKAN

description: Magda is an open-source data catalog and discovery platform for publishing, searching, and reusing open data. It provides configurable dataset metadata, organization support, and API-driven integrations for government and institutional data portals.

owner.name: Queensland Government Customer and Digital Group

name: Magda

description: OpenDataSoft is a software platform for publishing, managing, and sharing open data portals with dataset cataloging, APIs, and data visualization features for public and private organizations.
name: OpenDataSoft

description: Drupal is an open-source content management framework used to build and manage websites, including open data portals through dedicated modules, metadata extensions, and API integrations.
name: Drupal
POMOSAM
description: POMOSAM (CG eGOV) is a municipal eGovernment and open data publishing platform by CORA GEO, focused on publishing public city information, contracts, invoices, orders, and enabling citizen online communication with local administration.

name: data.gov.my
description: data.gov.my is Malaysia's national open data portal for publishing and discovering public-sector datasets across government domains. It provides dataset search and API-enabled access to structured data resources for reuse by citizens, researchers, and businesses.

owner.name: Malaysian Administrative Modernisation and Management Planning Unit (MAMPU)

description: 1C-Bitrix is a commercial web content management and portal platform used to build government and enterprise websites, including open data publication pages and catalog sections. It provides extensible modules, role-based administration, and API integration capabilities for publishing structured content and datasets.
name: Bitrix

description: Datawheel is a data platform provider focused on open data portals, economic complexity analytics, and AI-powered data tools for governments and international organizations.
name: DataWheel

description: Data Fair is an open-source data platform for managing, visualizing, exploring, and sharing datasets through configurable portals, interactive views, and API-based access.
name: Data Fair

description: TriplyDB is a linked-data and knowledge graph publishing platform used to host, query, and share datasets through SPARQL endpoints, APIs, and reusable data services.
name: TriplyDB

description: Aleph is an open-source investigative data platform for indexing, searching, and cross-referencing large collections of documents and structured datasets. It is designed for investigative journalism workflows and entity-centric research across people, companies, and related records.

owner.name: OCCRP (Organized Crime and Corruption Reporting Project)

name: Aleph

description: Junar is a proprietary open data platform for publishing, managing, and sharing datasets through catalog interfaces and APIs for government and enterprise data programs.
name: Junar

description: EntryScape is a linked-data-based information management platform for publishing and managing open data catalogs across the full metadata lifecycle, with strong support for DCAT-AP standards.
name: EntryScape

description: DKAN is an open-source data management and catalog platform built on Drupal for publishing, discovering, and reusing open data. It supports dataset metadata, organizations, APIs, and standards-based exports for government and institutional open data portals.
name: DKAN

description: DataPress is a managed open data portal platform used by public sector organizations, combining CKAN-based data catalog functionality with portal publishing and content management features.
name: DataPress
Data Library
description: Data Library is a geospatial and climate-focused data portal platform used to publish map-based datasets and interactive maproom views. It supports browsing and discovery of gridded and tabular data, provides downloadable data outputs in common geospatial formats, and is commonly used by meteorological and climate information services.

owner.name: International Research Institute for Climate and Society (IRI), Columbia University

description: OpenWIS is an open-source metadata catalog and data discovery platform designed for meteorological and geospatial information exchange. It provides cataloging, search, and standards-based interoperability features used in weather and climate data infrastructures.
name: OpenWIS
GIS WebServer SE
description: GIS WebServer SE is a web GIS platform for building geoportals and publishing spatial data services. It is designed for map visualization, layer management, and integration of geospatial resources through web interfaces and standards-based services.

GeoPortal.rlp is an open-source SDI suite for managing and publishing geospatial services and metadata, including OWS endpoints (WMS, WFS, CSW), ISO 19139 metadata workflows, map viewers, and organizational access controls. It is developed by the mrmap-community for deployments such as Geoportal Rheinland-Pfalz.
name: GeoPortal.rlp
Mapbender
description: Mapbender is an open-source geospatial web framework and geoportal solution for building map applications on top of OGC services and spatial data infrastructures. It provides configurable map viewers, search and editing tools, user and role management, and integrations for publishing and consuming geospatial resources in government and enterprise environments.

name: MapProxy
description: MapProxy is an open source proxy and cache for map services that accelerates and unifies access to geospatial data sources. It aggregates, tiles, and republishes map content from OGC and web map services through configurable WMS, WMTS, and TMS endpoints for geoportal and GIS applications.

name: ncWMS
description: ncWMS is an open-source web map service for serving NetCDF and other multidimensional environmental data as dynamic map layers. It provides OGC WMS support for scientific and meteorological datasets, enabling rendering, styling, and extraction workflows for geospatial portals and clients.

owner.name: Reading e-Science Centre, University of Reading

description: NextGIS Web is an open-source geospatial platform for publishing, managing, and editing spatial data through a web interface. It supports vector and raster layers, web maps, user access control, and integration via REST and OGC-compatible services.
name: NextGIS Web

description: pycsw is an open source OGC API - Records and CSW server implementation for publishing and searching geospatial metadata. It supports standards-based discovery, harvesting, and catalog interoperability for spatial data infrastructures and geoportals.
name: pycsw

description: ERDAS APOLLO is an enterprise geospatial content management and dissemination platform from Hexagon. It is used to catalog, govern, and publish raster and vector geospatial data and services, with support for metadata-driven discovery and OGC-compliant web service delivery in spatial data infrastructure deployments.
name: ERDAS APOLLO
GeoBlacklight
description: GeoBlacklight is an open-source geospatial discovery platform built on Blacklight and Apache Solr. It offers map-based and keyword search, faceted browsing, customizable metadata (including OpenGeoMetadata and the GeoBlacklight schema), and download and export options for maps and datasets. It is developed as a multi-institutional collaboration; the software is copyright Stanford University and licensed under Apache 2.0.

Koordinates is a cloud-native geospatial data platform used by governments, utilities, and private organizations to publish, manage, discover, and share spatial datasets. It supports enterprise data governance workflows, metadata management, and open-data publication with built-in APIs and OGC services for integration with GIS and analytics ecosystems.
name: Koordinates

description: SuperMap iServer is an enterprise geospatial server platform for publishing, managing, and sharing spatial data and GIS services. It provides RESTful and OGC service interfaces for map visualization, feature access, raster coverage, and integration into web and desktop geospatial applications.
name: SuperMap iServer

description: Oskari is an open-source geospatial platform and framework for building national and local geoportals. It provides map publishing, spatial data visualization, and integration capabilities through configurable APIs and OGC-compatible services.
name: Oskari

description: Lizmap is an open-source web GIS and geoportal platform built on QGIS Server for publishing, discovering, and sharing geospatial datasets, maps, and services. It supports standards-based interoperable geodata access and provides web and mobile clients for map viewing, search, and thematic exploration.
name: Lizmap

description: MetaGIS is a geospatial data management and map publishing platform used to build geoportals and spatial data infrastructures. It focuses on managing metadata, publishing map services, and delivering web-based geographic discovery and visualization workflows for public-sector and research users.
name: Metagis
smart.finder SDI
description: smart.finder SDI is a geospatial discovery and metadata portal platform by con terra for building spatial data infrastructures. It supports catalog-based search, metadata management, and integration with OGC and API-driven geospatial services used by public-sector geoportals.

name: GeoNode
description: GeoNode is an open-source platform for building spatial data infrastructures and geospatial data portals. It combines cataloging, search, metadata management, map composition, access control, and publishing workflows, and exposes data through OGC services and REST APIs. GeoNode is developed by an international open-source community and supported within the OSGeo ecosystem.

ORBISMap is a geospatial platform for publishing, managing, and visualizing spatial data in web geoportals and regional GIS systems. It supports high-load map services, integration with external systems, and API-based extension for custom applications.
name: ORBISMap
CARTO
description: CARTO is a cloud-native spatial analytics and mapping platform for building geospatial data pipelines, running SQL-based geospatial analysis, and publishing interactive maps and location intelligence applications. It integrates with modern cloud data warehouses, supports enterprise governance, and provides APIs and developer tooling for data-driven geo applications.

name: STAC Browser
description: STAC Browser is an open-source web application for browsing SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog (STAC) static catalogs and STAC APIs. It provides collection and item navigation, map previews, metadata inspection, and asset download links for STAC metadata.

Esri Geoportal Server is a metadata catalog platform for discovering and sharing geospatial resources across organizations. It supports standards-based cataloging and federated search, including CSW and OpenSearch interfaces, and can index metadata records from multiple systems for spatial data infrastructure and open data discovery workflows.
name: Esri Geoportal Server
GeoServer
description: GeoServer is an open-source geospatial server for publishing and managing vector and raster data through OGC standards and REST APIs. It enables organizations to serve interoperable map and feature services (WMS, WFS, WCS, WMTS), style layers with SLD, transform and export data in multiple formats, and build spatial data infrastructures and open-data geoportals.

Rasdaman is an array database and geospatial analytics platform for managing and processing multi-dimensional raster data via OGC-compliant web services. It is used for scalable Earth observation and scientific data infrastructures.
name: Rasdaman

description: PopGIS is a geospatial data portal platform used by Pacific institutions to publish and access maps, layers, and related geographic information through web mapping interfaces and interoperable geospatial services.
name: PopGIS
eLiteGIS
description: eLiteGIS is a server-based platform for building geographic information system (GIS) solutions, GIS portals, and spatial data infrastructures. It provides REST API services compatible with ArcGIS Server protocols and is commonly used with CoGIS to support online and offline map workflows.

name: Datacube Open Web Services
description: Datacube Open Web Services (datacube-ows) is an open-source OGC service layer for Open Data Cube deployments. It publishes multidimensional Earth observation datasets through standards-based WMS and WCS endpoints, enabling map visualization and raster data access for analysis workflows. It is maintained by the Open Data Cube community and is commonly used to expose Analysis Ready Data from national and regional datacube infrastructures.

name: stac-server
description: stac-server is an open-source STAC API implementation for publishing and querying geospatial metadata and assets. It provides a REST API for STAC catalogs, collections, and item search to support interoperable discovery workflows.

OpenGeoportal is an open-source geoportal platform for discovering, previewing, and accessing geospatial datasets across institutions. It supports federated search and metadata-driven discovery workflows for spatial data infrastructures, with integrations for standards-based geospatial services and export formats used by academic and public-sector data portals.
name: OpenGeoPortal
Wis 2.0 Box
description: WIS2 in a Box (wis2box) is an open-source reference implementation of a WMO WIS2 node for publishing, discovering, and exchanging meteorological and related geospatial data using standards-based web services and messaging.

name: ActiveMap GIS
description: ActiveMap GIS is a geoinformation platform from Gradoservice that combines web mapping, a desktop layer editor, and mobile apps. It supports map objects on thematic layers, task and work-order workflows, publishing data with access control, offline-capable mobile use, and integrations such as WMS and REST APIs (including Russian municipal portals).

Terria is an open-source geospatial web platform for building interactive map-based data portals. It supports catalog-driven data discovery, visualization of spatial and tabular datasets, and integration with external geospatial services.
name: Terria
GeoNetwork
description: GeoNetwork is an open-source catalog for discovering and sharing geospatial data and services. It offers search, faceted browsing, metadata editing with ISO 19115/19139 and Dublin Core, publication workflows, harvesting (CSW, OAI-PMH, WFS, and more), OGC CSW and REST APIs, DCAT export, and an interactive map viewer (OpenLayers) for WMS, WMTS, and related services. It is a reference implementation for spatial data infrastructures and is stewarded as an OSGeo project.

name: EWMAPA
description: EWMAPA is a GIS and geodesy platform used for cadastral, utility, and municipal spatial data management. It supports map publication and geospatial data sharing for local government and surveying workflows, including interoperability through common OGC-style service and exchange formats.

name: ArcGIS Server
description: ArcGIS Server is Esri's on-premises and private-cloud GIS server for publishing maps, feature layers, imagery, and geoprocessing as web services. It provides REST and SOAP endpoints plus OGC interfaces (WMS, WFS, WCS), CSW catalog services, and integrates with ArcGIS Enterprise components such as Portal for ArcGIS for security, licensing, and content management in regulated and air-gapped environments.

name: ArcGIS Hub
description: ArcGIS Hub is Esri's cloud-based community engagement platform for sharing open data, maps, and initiatives. Organizations use it with ArcGIS Online to publish branded Hub sites, curate datasets and teams, run goals and initiatives, and engage the public with low-code web experiences. It exposes content through ArcGIS Hub and ArcGIS Online REST APIs, DCAT feeds, and OGC API Records, with governance and licensing options suited to government and enterprise open-data programs.

IsiGéo is a geospatial information system and geoportal platform for publishing, visualizing, and sharing geographic datasets, map layers, and related metadata through web interfaces and API-enabled services.
name: IsiGéo

description: QGIS Web Client 2 (QWC2) is an open source web GIS framework for publishing interactive geoportals on top of QGIS projects and OGC services. It provides configurable map viewers, search, feature info, and integration through REST-based backend services.
name: QGIS Web Client 2 (QWC2)

description: Open Data Cube is an open-source platform for indexing, managing, and analyzing large spatiotemporal Earth observation datasets. It provides a Python-centric data cube model and API for scalable analytics, and is commonly integrated with STAC-compatible metadata services in national and regional geospatial data infrastructures.
name: Open Data Cube

description: pygeoapi is an open source Python server implementation of OGC API standards for publishing and querying geospatial data. It provides RESTful access to vector, raster, and record collections with support for multiple OGC interfaces.
name: pygeoapi

description: Fusion Metadata Registry (FMR) is an SDMX-native metadata and registry platform for publishing structural metadata, code lists, and related services via REST APIs.

owner.name: Center for Expanded Data Annotation and Retrieval (CEDAR), Stanford University

name: Fusion Metadata Registry

description: Aristotle Metadata Registry is an open-source metadata registry platform for authoring, managing, and publishing structured metadata models and controlled vocabularies through a web interface and API-driven workflows.
name: Aristotle Metadata Registry
Metadata Browser
description: Metadata Browser is a metadata catalog and discovery interface from MetadataWorks, designed to help organizations publish and explore datasets, standards, and terminologies with configurable search and federated visibility features.

GBIF Platform is the data infrastructure of the Global Biodiversity Information Facility, providing access to species occurrence records, taxonomic backbones, and metadata from biodiversity publishers worldwide through web search, APIs, and downloadable data packages.
name: GBIF Platform

description: Worktribe is a commercial research management and repository platform used by universities and research organizations to manage grants, publications, impact, and research data workflows.
name: Worktribe
Australian Ocean Data Network (AODN) Portal
description: The Australian Ocean Data Network (AODN) Portal is a marine and climate data discovery platform that provides search, map-based exploration, API access, and download workflows for ocean observations and related environmental datasets.

owner.name: Australian Ocean Data Network (AODN), Integrated Marine Observing System (IMOS)

description: Elsevier Digital Commons is a hosted institutional repository platform for publishing, preserving, and showcasing scholarly outputs, research data, and related academic content.
name: Elsevier Digital Commons

description: Galaxy is an open-source web-based platform for accessible, reproducible, and transparent computational biomedical research, supporting data analysis workflows, tool integration, and collaborative science.
name: Galaxy

description: Figshare is a cloud-based repository platform for publishing, preserving, discovering, and sharing research outputs with persistent identifiers, citation support, and institutional repository workflows.
name: Figshare

description: Haplo is a research information management and repository platform used by universities and research organizations to manage, publish, and discover research outputs and related metadata.
name: Haplo
dLibra
description: dLibra is a digital library and repository platform used by libraries, archives, and research organizations to publish, describe, and provide access to scientific and cultural collections through web interfaces and metadata harvesting.
DSpace is an open source repository platform for managing, preserving, and sharing scholarly and scientific digital assets with support for institutional repositories and long-term access.
name: DSpace

description: LibreCat is an open-source publication and research information repository platform developed by a community of library technologists for managing, enriching, and publishing scholarly metadata and records.
name: LibreCat
HUBzero
description: HUBzero is an open-source software platform for building science and engineering gateways and collaborative research portals with tools for data sharing, publishing, and community engagement.

Pure is Elsevier's research information management platform for institutions to manage profiles, publications, datasets, and reporting workflows, with support for discovery and interoperability via standard metadata protocols.
name: Pure

description: Omega-PSIR is a university research information system that combines CRIS, institutional repository, researcher profiling, and research data repository capabilities in one platform.

owner.name: Institute of Computer Science, Warsaw University of Technology

name: Omega-PSIR

description: LinkAhead is an open-source research data management software toolkit that helps institutions and research teams integrate, organize, and publish FAIR research data across heterogeneous systems.
name: IndiScale LinkAhead

description: DSpace CRIS is an open-source research information and data repository platform built on DSpace, designed to manage publications, datasets, projects, people, and institutional research outputs with interoperability and persistent identifiers.
name: DSpace CRIS

description: OpenML is an open machine learning platform and repository for sharing, discovering, and reusing datasets, tasks, flows, and experiment results.
name: OpenML

description: Esploro is a research information management and repository platform by Ex Libris for showcasing, managing, and disseminating institutional research outputs, including publications and datasets.
name: Esploro

description: RAMADDA (Repository for Archiving, Managing and Accessing Diverse Data) is an open-source data repository platform for publishing, searching, and serving scientific datasets with metadata and API access.
name: RAMADDA

description: InstDB is the institutional research data repository component of the FairStack suite (Chinese Academy of Sciences / CNIC). It supports publication review, discovery, access, and user services for openly published scientific data; standardized service interfaces for interoperability; and assigns persistent identifiers including DOI and CSTR. It integrates with the DataSpace collaboration tool for team workflows and is aimed at FAIR-oriented scientific data centers.

owner.name: Computer Network Information Center, Chinese Academy of Sciences

name: InstDB

description: WEKO3 is an open-source institutional repository platform for managing, publishing, and preserving scientific outputs and datasets with configurable metadata workflows.

owner.name: Research Center for Open Science and Data Platform (RCOS), National Institute of Informatics

name: WEKO3

description: SEANOE (SEA scieNtific Open data Edition) is IFREMER's scientific data repository and publishing platform for oceanographic and environmental datasets, providing long-term access, metadata indexing, and DOI assignment workflows.
name: IFREMER Catalog
Converis
description: Converis is a commercial current research information system (CRIS) used by universities and research organizations to manage research profiles, outputs, projects, grants, and reporting workflows in a centralized platform.
OntoPortal is an open-source ontology repository platform for publishing, browsing, annotating, and accessing biomedical and domain ontologies through web interfaces and REST APIs.

owner.name: Stanford Center for Biomedical Informatics Research

name: OntoPortal

description: InvenioRDM is an open source research data repository platform for publishing, curating, and sharing datasets with configurable metadata, persistent identifiers, access control, and interoperability features for institutional and domain repositories.
name: InvenioRDM

description: PyDAP is an open-source Python implementation of the OPeNDAP Data Access Protocol, used to publish and access scientific datasets with remote subsetting and variable-level retrieval over HTTP.
name: PyDAP

description: VuFind is an open-source discovery platform used by libraries to index and search catalogs, digital repositories, and research outputs through a unified interface with faceted search and API-based integrations.
name: VuFind
DataLad
description: DataLad is an open source data management and distribution framework built on Git and git-annex, used in scientific workflows to version datasets, track provenance, and automate reproducible data access across local and remote storage.

Hyrax is an open-source repository front-end framework in the Samvera ecosystem for publishing, managing, and preserving research outputs and related digital objects with configurable metadata workflows.
name: Hyrax

description: Dataverse is an open-source research data repository platform for publishing, sharing, citing, exploring, and reusing research datasets with rich metadata, versioning, and persistent identifiers.

owner.name: The President and Fellows of Harvard College

name: Dataverse

description: THREDDS Data Server (TDS) is an open-source web server for cataloging, accessing, and subsetting scientific datasets via OPeNDAP and OGC web services.
name: Thredds
Djehuty
description: Djehuty is an open source data repository platform for managing, publishing, and preserving scientific datasets, developed for research data workflows and institutional repositories.
Samvera is an open-source, community-driven repository framework ecosystem for building, managing, preserving, and sharing scholarly and cultural heritage digital collections.
name: Samvera
DataONE
description: DataONE (Data Observation Network for Earth) is a distributed scientific data repository and discovery network that helps researchers preserve, discover, and access Earth and environmental science data across participating member nodes.

ICAT is an open-source scientific data catalog and metadata management platform for large-scale research facilities, supporting dataset discovery, access control, and integration with facility data workflows.
name: ICAT

description: ERDDAP is an open-source scientific data server for publishing and accessing tabular and gridded environmental datasets through web services, APIs, and multiple machine-readable download formats.

owner.name: NOAA NMFS Southwest Fisheries Science Center

name: ERDDAP

description: Islandora is an open-source digital repository framework built on Drupal and Fedora for managing, preserving, and providing access to scholarly and cultural heritage content with flexible metadata and workflow extensions.
name: Islandora

description: MyCoRe is an open-source framework for building scientific repositories and digital library platforms with modular metadata workflows, OAI-PMH support, and flexible integrations for institutional and domain-specific collections.
name: MyCore

description: EPrints is an open-source repository platform for managing, preserving, and sharing scholarly publications and research data via institutional and subject repositories with standards-based interoperability.
name: EPrints

description: MyTardis is an open-source research data management and repository platform designed to capture, organize, publish, and share scientific datasets with rich metadata and workflow integration.
name: MyTardis
GBIF Integrated Publishing Toolkit (IPT)
description: GBIF Integrated Publishing Toolkit (IPT) is an open source platform for publishing and managing biodiversity datasets and metadata using community standards, with support for dataset versioning, indexing, and machine-readable exports.
OPeNDAP is an open-source data access protocol and software ecosystem that enables remote subsetting and retrieval of scientific array and tabular data from distributed servers over HTTP.
name: OPeNDAP

description: InvenioRDM is an open-source research data repository framework for managing, publishing, and preserving datasets with rich metadata, persistent identifiers, and interoperable APIs.
name: InvenioRDM
Atlas of Living Australia
description: Atlas of Living Australia (ALA) is Australia's national biodiversity data platform for discovering species occurrence records, collections, and ecological information. It provides web interfaces and APIs for search, filtering, mapping, and bulk downloads of biodiversity datasets contributed by many institutions.
